summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 9 (Advanced Stats Adjustments), Phase 10 (Statcast Contact Context), and Objetivo 2 (Offensive Pressure Base) implementation. All 604 pytest tests pass (550 previous + 54 new), backend boots cleanly, all API endpoints respond correctly, module imports work, and fail-soft behavior verified.

backend_issues.notes: Zero backend issues found. All systems operational.

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing not required per testing_type: 'backend only'

passed_tests: Backend boot without errors - supervisor logs clean
Module imports: mlb_pressure_base (calculate_match_pressure_context, derive_pressure_impact_for_under_pick)
Module imports: mlb_explosive_inning_engine (_detect_statcast_contact_context, evaluate_explosive_inning)
Pytest suite: 604/604 tests passed (100% success rate)
New test files: test_mlb_pressure_base_objetivo2.py (18 tests)
New test files: test_mlb_explosive_inning_statcast_phase10.py (12 tests)
New test files: test_mlb_advanced_stats_phase9_wiring.py (16 tests)
Fail-soft behavior: evaluate_explosive_inning({}) returns valid dict with statcast_contact=0
API endpoint: POST /api/auth/login (200 OK, token obtained)
API endpoint: GET /api/picks/today?sport=baseball (200 OK, empty list valid)
API endpoint: GET /api/picks/today?sport=football (200 OK)
API endpoint: GET /api/debug/thestatsapi/health?probe=true (200 OK, enabled=true)
API endpoint: GET /api/analysis/jobs (200 OK)
API endpoint: GET /api/meta/sports (200 OK, sports: football, basketball, baseball)
Phase 9 wiring verified in mlb_day_orchestrator.py (lines 1519-1632)
Phase 9: Data quality weighting implemented (strong=60%, partial=35%, missing=0%)
Phase 9: Metadata persistence in pick_payload['advanced_adjustments'] with raw_breakdown and weighted_adjustment
Objetivo 2 wiring verified in mlb_day_orchestrator.py (lines 1633-1689)
Objetivo 2: Uses baseballHistoricalProfile.recentRunSplit as input (per user spec)
Objetivo 2: Thresholds match specification (HIGH: hits≥9.0 AND runs≤3.5, MODERATE: hits≥8.0 AND runs≤4.0, LOW: hits≤6.5 AND runs≤3.5)
Phase 10: _detect_statcast_contact_context() integrated in mlb_explosive_inning_engine.py
Phase 10: statcast_contact bucket added to score_contributions (capped at ±8)
Phase 10: Fail-soft behavior for missing advanced_stats_snapshot

success_percentage.backend: 100% (604/604 pytest tests + 6/6 API endpoints + 2/2 module imports + 1/1 fail-soft test)
success_percentage.frontend: N/A (not tested per testing_type: backend only)

key_features: compute_all_advanced_adjustments() called after advanced_stats_snapshot persistence
Data quality weighting: strong=60%, partial=35%, thin=35%, missing=0%
Adjustments capped at ±15 per helper internally
Weighted confidence delta applied to recommendation.confidence_score
Metadata saved in pick_payload['advanced_adjustments'] with raw_breakdown and weighted_adjustment
Reason codes propagated to pick_payload['reason_codes']
Fail-soft: exceptions caught and logged without breaking orchestrator
_detect_statcast_contact_context() function added
Reads metrics['advanced_stats_snapshot'] (canonical shape from mlb_statcast_adapter)
Adjusts pressure score based on pitcher barrel_pct_allowed, hard_hit_pct_allowed, xwoba_allowed
Considers batting team power profile (team_barrel_pct, team_xwoba)
Cooling factor for both pitchers with low contact metrics
Capped at ±8 points (single helper budget)
Integrated into evaluate_explosive_inning() with statcast_contact bucket in score_contributions
Fail-soft: missing snapshot returns (0, [], [], {})
calculate_match_pressure_context() builds full pressure_base payload
Uses baseballHistoricalProfile.recentRunSplit as input (per user spec)
Thresholds: HIGH (hits≥9.0 AND runs≤3.5), MODERATE (hits≥8.0 AND runs≤4.0), LOW (hits≤6.5 AND runs≤3.5), NEUTRAL (otherwise)
Combined tier classification (sum of home + away)
Live hits acceleration override (delta ≥3 promotes tier)
derive_pressure_impact_for_under_pick() applies confidence and fragility deltas
Under picks at HIGH pressure: fragility_delta=+8, confidence_delta=-7
Under picks at MODERATE pressure: fragility_delta=+5, confidence_delta=-4
Under picks at LOW pressure: fragility_delta=-3, confidence_delta=+2
Reason codes: RC_UNDER_PICK_HIGH_PRESSURE, RC_UNDER_PICK_MODERATE_PRESSURE, RC_LOW_PRESSURE_CONTROLLED
Fail-soft: missing data returns {available: False, ...}

regression_check.notes: Zero regressions detected. All previous functionality intact.
